task: OpenClaw Notion Slack and gateway live health probes

requirements.requirement: Verify Notion with a real read-only API call
requirements.evidence: GET https://api.notion.com/v1/users/me with integration auth; no content mutation

requirements.requirement: Verify Slack bot with a real read-only API call
requirements.evidence: POST https://slack.com/api/auth.test; no Slack message emitted

requirements.requirement: Verify OpenClaw runtime rather than CLI presence
Expose probe result, observed time, latency, and safe error without secrets
requirements.evidence: status_snapshot integration records and deterministic status brief

requirements.requirement: Verify deployed Mac Mini and Slack DM entrypoint
requirements.evidence: Pending scoped deploy and post-deploy live status run

governance_bootstrap.summary: Read completion, deployment, secrets, and live-entrypoint requirements.
Read source-of-truth, real runtime verification, and completion evidence rules.

verification.name: OpenClaw quality and integration regression
verification.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/score_openclaw_response_quality.py ...; .venv/bin/python scripts/score_openclaw_e2e_golden.py ...; .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_openclaw_bridge.py tests/test_openclaw_response_quality.py tests/test_openclaw_agent.py tests/test_slack_listener.py tests/test_openclaw_slack_e2e_probe.py -q
verification.result: passed: contract safety 240/240, actual run E2E 9/9, pytest 112 passed with one third-party deprecation warning

verification.name: Mac Mini pre-deploy API baseline
verification.target: Mac Mini production status API output
verification.command: ssh macmini; openclaw_codex_bridge.py status --format json; sanitize with jq
verification.result: baseline confirmed old deployment only reports available=true and lacks configured/live_checked/probe/latency fields; proves deployment delta remains necessary

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh after scoped commit and push

residual_risk: Post-deploy Mac Mini live API results and Slack-rendered answer are not yet verified.
API probes validate authentication and gateway health, not every downstream Notion database permission or every Slack posting target.
